_documentation.purpose: Per-supplier Fuel Component % under PAR/* contracts, used as the contractually-locked input to the Fact Sheet fuel levy formula.
_documentation.formula_role: Levy = Work_ex_GST x Fuel_Component_% x Fuel_Escalation_%
_documentation.source_evidence_rule: Every supplier entry must reference the contract variation letter, schedule, or other formal document that locks the Fuel Component %. Entries without a sighted source must not be added.
_documentation.update_rule: Fuel Components are contractually locked and do not change between invoices. Only update an entry if a new contract variation letter is issued. When updating, copy the old entry into a 'historical' block with the effective date range, do not overwrite.

suppliers.trading_entity: R. S. T. Systems Pty. Limited
suppliers.source_document: DM19354756 - Council to Vinton Tree Services, Proposed Contract Variation Temporary Fuel Levy, 20 April 2026, attention Mat Vinton
suppliers.notes: Fuel Component locked at 19.7% in the 20 April 2026 contract variation letter responding to Middle East crisis fuel prices. Formula explicitly stated as Fuel Levy surcharge = Fuel Escalation Percentage (%) x Fuel Component (19.7%).
